title: 2026 Golden Globes Best Actor: Timothee Chalamet Wins for Marty Supreme
text: Chalamet won the Golden Globe for Best Actor in a Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy for his role in Marty Supreme, directed by Josh Safdie. This marks his first Golden Globe win after five previous nominations (Call Me by Your Name, Beautiful Boy, Wonka, and A Complete Unknown). The victory comes just one week after Chalamet secured the Critics Choice Award for the same role, demonstrating strong momentum in awards season. Chalamet expressed gratitude to his fellow nominees and director Safdie, stating: This category is stacked. I look up to all of you, thank you. He also thanked his co-stars and the film's writers, including a humorous acknowledgment of Kevin O'Leary from Shark Tank. Chalamet defeated George Clooney, Leonardo DiCaprio, Ethan Hawke, Lee Byung-hun, and Jesse Plemons in the category.
